description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs code checks with different build tools on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: python-build, nix-flake, and generated-docs. The python-build job should run on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.8 and 3.12, install the build module, and build the package. The nix-flake job should install Nix, checkout the code, and build a derivation. The generated-docs job should regenerate and compare generated documentation.
